description: New user creates a profile, starts intake, exchanges a few messages, and exits cleanly.
scripted_responses: I've been feeling anxious about work, and it has started affecting my sleep.
It is mostly pressure from deadlines and worrying that my manager thinks I am falling behind.
I notice my chest gets tight at night and I replay conversations from the day.
I'd like help challenging the thought that one mistake means I'm failing.
fallback_response: I'm feeling anxious about work and would like to understand it better.
